title: Gateway latency spike
summary: p95 climbed past 300ms after the 14:00 deploy; rolled back and watching.

title: Token refresh errors
summary: Clock skew on one auth node caused intermittent 401s; node recycled.

title: Search index lag
summary: Reindex job backed up; scaled the worker pool and drained the queue.

title: Elevated decline rate
summary: Upstream processor timeouts; failed over to the secondary processor.

title: Pipeline backpressure
summary: Consumer lag spiked during a traffic burst; added partitions.

title: Brief 5xx burst
summary: A bad config push returned 500s for 4 minutes; auto-rollback caught it.
